question.label: Energy levels post-launch
question.name: What do you think is driving your current energy levels after the payments refactor?
question.description: Explores underlying reasons for current energy levels and motivation.

answer: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.

assessment.note: Describes a low-stimulus, unstretched state, indicating mild negative wellbeing.

history.answer_excerpt: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
